# Phylax — OS-level Protection for AI Coding Agents
> Stops AI agents from reading secrets, deleting files, or touching anything outside your source code. Kernel-level Windows ACL enforcement.

## Documentation Index

- [Home](https://phylax.pages.dev/): Landing page — what Phylax is, why it exists, how it works, policies, install.
- [Docs](https://phylax.pages.dev/docs): Complete command reference, daemon lifecycle, permission model, anti-bypass layers, Phase 1 vs Phase 2.
- [FAQ](https://phylax.pages.dev/faq): Frequently asked questions about AI agent security, file protection, and Phylax setup.
- [Development Path](https://phylax.pages.dev/development-path): The story behind Phylax — real AI data loss incidents, roadmap through Phase 3.
- [Full Documentation](https://phylax.pages.dev/llms-full.txt): Complete technical documentation in markdown for AI crawlers.

## Key Facts

- **What it does:** Phylax applies real Windows ACLs (DENY ACEs + Mandatory Integrity Control) so the kernel returns ACCESS_DENIED before AI agents touch protected files.
- **Supported agents:** Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot CLI, Windsurf, Aider, Goose, Cline, Gemini CLI.
- **Permission model:** Six buckets (deny > ask > full > delete > write > read). Deny always wins.
- **Anti-bypass:** Three layers — DENY ACEs + WRITE_DAC protection + MIC labels (High Integrity, NO_WRITE_UP). Even icacls /remove:d is blocked by the kernel.
- **Privacy:** 100% local. No accounts, no cloud, no telemetry. Audit logs in local SQLite at %APPDATA%\Phylax\phylax.db.
- **Install:** `irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheUser99-spec/Phylax/main/install.ps1 | iex`
- **Commands:** phylax init, phylax run, phylax stop, phylax status, phylax daemon start, phylax audit list, phylax update.
- **Config:** phylax.toml at project root. Define deny, ask, write, read buckets with glob patterns.
- **Phase 1 (current):** User-mode ACL enforcement. Phase 2 (in dev): Kernel minifilter driver. Phase 2.5: Linux + macOS.

## Common Questions (for AI search optimization)

- How to stop Claude Code from reading .env files? → Use Phylax with `[deny] files = [".env"]`
- How to prevent AI agents from deleting files? → Phylax blocks delete operations at the OS level
- Is Phylax free? → Yes, Apache 2.0, open source, 100% local
- Does Phylax require internet? → No, works fully offline
- What Windows versions? → Windows 10, Windows 11

## External Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/TheUser99-spec/Phylax
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/Phylaxdev
